CREATE TABLE csv.tutorials.contacts1 (Id INTEGER, Fname VARCHAR, Sname VARCHAR, Age INTEGER);
COPY INTO csv.tutorials.contacts1 FROM FILE 'file:contacts1.csv' WITH (DELIMITER ',', ROW_DELIMITER '\n');
SELECT * FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1 WHERE Age > 30;
SELECT Fname, Sname FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1 WHERE Sname LIKE 'S%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1;
SELECT DISTINCT Fname FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1;
CREATE TABLE csv.tutorials.contacts2 (Fname VARCHAR, Sname VARCHAR, Age INTEGER);
COPY INTO csv.tutorials.contacts2 FROM FILE 'file:contacts2.csv' WITH (DELIMITER ',', ROW_DELIMITER '\n', HEADER = true);
SELECT * FROM csv.tutorials.contacts2 ORDER BY Age DESC;
SELECT c1.Fname, c2.Sname FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1 c1 JOIN csv.tutorials.contacts2 c2 ON c1.Age = c2.Age;
SELECT c.Fname, COUNT(*) FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1 c GROUP BY c.Fname HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE csv.tutorials.contacts3 (CompanyName VARCHAR, CompanyID INTEGER, Fname VARCHAR, Sname VARCHAR, Age INTEGER);
COPY INTO csv.tutorials.contacts3 FROM FILE 'file:contacts3.csv' WITH (DELIMITER ',', ROW_DELIMITER '\n');
SELECT * FROM csv.tutorials.contacts3 WHERE CompanyID IN (SELECT CompanyID FROM csv.tutorials.contacts3 WHERE Age < 30);
SELECT CompanyName, AVG(Age) FROM csv.tutorials.contacts3 GROUP BY CompanyName HAVING AVG(Age) > 50;
SELECT * FROM csv.tutorials.contacts3 c3 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM csv.tutorials.contacts1 c1 WHERE c1.Fname = c3.Fname);
CREATE TABLE csv.tutorials.empty_table (Id INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM csv.tutorials.empty_table WHERE Id IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE csv.tutorials.contacts_invalid (Id VARCHAR, Fname VARCHAR, Sname VARCHAR);
COPY INTO csv.tutorials.contacts_invalid FROM FILE 'file:contacts2.csv' WITH (DELIMITER ',', ROW_DELIMITER '\n');
